$comment: Mobile Progress Bar Intermediate (Indeterminate) Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Progress Bar Intermediate — an animated indeterminate progress bar used when the total progress is unknown. Displays a sliding or shimmering indicator segment over a static track. Figma Reference: Node ID 388-1757

$component.name: Progress Bar Intermediate
$component.description: An indeterminate progress bar used when total progress cannot be determined. The indicator animates continuously (left-to-right sweep or shimmer gradient) over a static gray track. Used as a sub-component inside Progress Indicator when state=Indeterminate.
$component.structure: Single track container (overflow-clip, pill border-radius) with an absolutely positioned animated indicator segment. The indicator is narrower than the track and moves either from left-to-right or displays a center-gradient shimmer.

property1.Default: Indicator sweeps from left: starts at left: -110px, animating right across the track
property1.Variant2: Indicator sweeps from right: starts at right: -118px, animating left across the track
property1.Variant3: Shimmer gradient: centered gradient from gray/200 to primary/600 to gray/200 (shimmer effect)

usage.contexts: Used as a sub-component of Progress Indicator when state=Indeterminate. Also usable standalone for loading states where total progress is unknown.
usage.features: Continuous animation, 3 animation variants (sweep-left, sweep-right, shimmer), single fixed height, overflow clipping

track.$comment: The static container that the animated indicator moves within

height.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar track height - 8px (matches determinate progress bar thin height)

border-radius.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar track border radius - fully circular pill (rounded-[64px] in Figma)

color.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar track background color - gray/200 - #eaecf0 (the unfilled portion of the bar)

overflow.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar track overflow - clip (prevents the animated indicator segment from showing outside the track bounds)

indicator.$comment: The animated segment that moves across the track — narrower than track width

height.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar indicator height - 8px (matches track height)

width.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar indicator width - 110px (~34% of 320px reference container). This is the sliding segment size for Default and Variant2 animation modes.

border-radius.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar indicator border radius - fully circular pill (matches track shape)

color.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar indicator color - primary/blue/600 - #155eef (the solid fill used in Default and Variant2 sweep animations)

shimmer.$comment: Gradient properties for Variant3 (shimmer/pulse animation) — a gradient that sweeps across center

width.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar shimmer gradient width - 160px (50% of 320px reference container)

from.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar shimmer gradient start color - gray/200 - #eaecf0 (matches track, fades in from left)

via.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar shimmer gradient center color - primary/blue/600 - #155eef at 53.85% position (the bright shimmer peak)

to.description: Mobile indeterminate progress bar shimmer gradient end color - gray/200 - #eaecf0 (matches track, fades out to right)
